'''Thul Fain''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and worked alongside [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Tanbris/Legends|Tanbris]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Fain left Imperial service by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and worked as a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] for the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]. During his [[Time/Legends|time]] at the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], Fain was also a [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] and enjoyed betting on how long the victims of [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|Jabba's rancor]] would last. In 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], Fain was in Jabba's Palace when [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] leader [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] [[Siege of Jabba's Palace|arrived]] with the intent to rescue her ally, smuggler [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], from his [[Prison/Legends|imprisonment]] there.

==Biography==
The [[Human/Legends|Human]] Thul Fain<ref name="CCG" /> lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a conflict between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="RotJ" /> At some point prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="Tanbris">{{CSWECite|III|216|Tanbris, Lieutenant}} reveals that [[Tanbris/Legends|Tanbris]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].</ref> Fain was an Imperial [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], and he worked alongside [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Tanbris/Legends|Tanbris]].<ref name="CCG" /> By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes that the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] take place in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> Fain left Imperial service and became a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] working for<ref name="CCG" /> the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]<ref name="Jabba CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|130|Jabba the Hutt (Jabba Desilijic Tiure)}}</ref> [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]],<ref name="CCG" /> who operated out of a [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="Jabba CSWE" /> While working for Jabba, Fain was also a [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] who liked betting on how long victims<ref name="CCG" /> whom the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] threw into the pit of [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|his rancor]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|251|Fain, Thul}}</ref> would last. At some point around that [[Time/Legends|time]], Fain was a passenger aboard<ref name="CCG" /> the Hutt's [[Luxury-class sail barge|luxury sail barge]],<ref name="RotJ" /> [[Khetanna/Legends|''Khetanna'']].<ref name="CCG" />

In 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="NEC" /> Alliance leader [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], disguised as the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]], [[Siege of Jabba's Palace|arrived]] at the palace with the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], intending to rescue her ally, smuggler [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], from Jabba's clutches. When [[Standard day/Legends|night]] fell, Fain was among those [[Sleep/Legends|sleeping]] in the Hutt's audience chamber when Organa [[Rescue of Han Solo/Legends|freed]] Solo and attempted to escape with him before both were caught and [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]].<ref name="RotJ" />

==Personality and traits==
As a gambler, Thul Fain enjoyed betting on how long the [[Rancor/Legends|rancor's]] victims would last. He had [[Color/Legends|gray]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and light skin.<ref name="CCG" />

==Equipment==
Thul Fain wore a green [[Robe/Legends|robe]] over a brown outfit that also included a hood.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Thul Fain first appeared in the [[1983]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] as an uncredited extra in the scenes taking place in Jabba's Palace.<ref name="RotJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref> He was first named in the [[1998]] ''[[Jabba's Palace Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" />
